ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., 34, S, M, L) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category the size belongs to */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., numeric, alpha, plus size) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size belongs to (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "size_chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_rules" (
  "conversion_rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion rule */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the conversion rule belongs to */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the conversion rule is for */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart used for the conversion rule */,
  "conversion_formula" TEXT /* Formula for converting sizes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the conversion belongs to */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the conversion is for */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original size */,
  "converted_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the converted size */,
  "conversion_rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversion rule used for the conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_converted_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("converted_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_conversion_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversion_rule_id") REFERENCES conversion_rules ("conversion_rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the measurement belongs to */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the measurement is for */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., body measurement, garment measurement) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_measurements" (
  "user_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user measurement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_measurements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommended_sizes" (
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommended size */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the recommended size belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommended_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommended_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommended_sizes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
